# 🚀 ComplianceStack LAUNCHED!

## Repository: https://github.com/nyayoshbharuchanb15-max/ComplianceStack

### Release: v2.0.0 ✅

---

## What Just Happened

ComplianceStack is now **LIVE** on GitHub with:

✅ **17-Phase AI Compliance Audit Pipeline**
✅ **MCP Server Integration** (Claude Desktop, Cursor, Windsurf)
✅ **5 Regulatory Frameworks** (EU AI Act, GDPR, NIST AI RMF, ISO 42001, India DPDP Act)
✅ **Zero Data Egress Architecture**
✅ **W3C Verifiable Credentials**
✅ **BLOCKER FAIL Mechanism**
✅ **Complete Documentation & Launch Kit**

---
